sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Na thu sung bekmah lametna nei ing
Mitte vaksak in lungsim nuamsak hi
Na thusungah Topa kei hongkha in.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Na thu in lam honglak meivak hi, (Hallelu jah)
Ka paina lampi khua hongvak sak hi,
A lamdang nate kamuh theih nangin,
Na thusung ah Topa kei hong kha in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mihing te'nuntak na in, an, leh tui bek hilo hi.
Pasian kammal thutak tawh nungta hi,
Hih thu a theih nangin Mana tawh vak hi.
Sehnel gamah Topa in thuhilh hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Zan a ihmut kalin hong cing ding hi,
Na khanlawh ciang zong hong hopih ding hi
Na gamtat zia dingzong honghilh ding hi.
